sourceMovie.title: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc works as a animation movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The animation and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.
